title: Singing in the Dark
writer: Ann Hood, Aben Kandel, Stephen Kandel
actors: Moyshe Oysher, Phyllis Hill, Joey Adams
plot: Leo is a holocaust survivor who suffers from total amnesia; he comes to the U.S. and works as a hotel desk clerk. One night while a comedian, who owns a bar in the hotel, gives him a drink, he breaks out in song and discovers a gr...
